changes.description: Meowtator request handling is easier for raid managers.
changes.details: Accepted request threads now offer a create-signup flow and a done action so moderators can turn a request into a signup with less manual copying.

changes.description: Raid Management signup drafting is easier to use.
changes.details: DPS and support counts now default from the selected raid composition, with optional custom spot editing only when needed.

changes.description: Meowtator signup names now use server profile names.
changes.details: Discord signup rows now prefer each member's server profile name instead of their global display name.

changes.description: Request-to-signup creation now supports more details.
changes.details: Managers can add signup info text and pre-register members directly from an accepted request, with the requester prefilled for faster setup.
Raid managers can now delete ongoing signup sheets from the app or from the Discord signup message, and Meowtator removes the related Discord message.

changes.description: Raid requests now support sidereal leaders.
changes.details: Meowtator requests now ask if the requester can handle sidereals, and signup sheets can reserve or assign a visible lobby host/leader spot.

changes.description: Meowtator reminders and cleanup are smarter.
changes.details: Signup reminders can now be sent automatically before raid start, and finished backlog tickets are cleaned up after their useful window.

changes.description: Raid Management drafts now show missing input more clearly.
changes.details: Saving an incomplete signup draft now highlights the missing raid, start time, or spot configuration instead of silently doing nothing.

changes.description: Meowtator signup rows show animated role icons correctly.
changes.details: ANY, experienced, and can-help emoji markers now render properly in signup rows instead of only working on the buttons.

changes.description: Raid request date and time input is stricter.
changes.details: Meowtator now rejects free-text date or time values and asks users to refill the request with numeric server date and server time.
